ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "abide_id" INTEGER /* ABIDE ID of the subject */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the subject (ASD or control) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the subject (M or F) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the subject */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the subject */,
  "site" TEXT /* Site where the data was collected */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the subject */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Consent status for data usage */,
  "study_id" TEXT /* ID of the study the subject is part of */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brain_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brain region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the brain region (e.g., BA3_1_2_5) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brain region */,
  "anatomical_coordinates" TEXT /* Anatomical coordinates of the brain region */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the brain region */,
  "hemisphere" TEXT /* Hemisphere of the brain region (left or right) */,
  "functional_description" TEXT /* Functional description of the brain region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neuroimaging_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the data belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brain region the data is from */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the neuroimaging data */,
  "imaging_modality" TEXT /* Imaging modality used (e.g., MRI, fMRI, PET) */,
  "imaging_date" TEXT /* Date when the imaging was performed */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the imaging data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the imaging file */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., ABIDE, other studies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neuroimaging_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES brain_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neuroimaging_data_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used for access */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
